sections.paragraph:
Original: יוחא

Transliteration: yôchâ'

Phonetic: yo-khaw'

BDB Definition:

Joha = "Jehovah gives life"
  1. one of the sons of Beriah the Benjamite
  2. the Tizite, one of David's mighty warriors

Origin: probably from H3068 and a variation of H2421

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
